fields.acceptance_criteria: GET /api/tickets/{id}/history returns all revisions with timestamps and field snapshots; POST /api/tickets/{id}/revert with target revision number; new revision appended (non-destructive); proper error for invalid rev
fields.title: API: History and revert endpoints
